reviews.review_description: Loved the first island. There was so much to do. The game became my new obsession. I was excited to go to the second island but completed it in no time and now what? There’s no way to go find a new island or to continue the game. You would think there would be more with everything the first island had you build and do, and they give you pumpkins but nothing to do with them. Was the game unfinished called good enough and had a $5 price tag thrown on it? I even let the skeleton kill me hoping it would bring me to another island. Nope. Tried uninstalling and reinstalling the game in hopes my progress would be lost and I could return to the island that was the tutorial. But nope. Now I’m just stuck with nothing to do. Why? What was the point of the tutorial if the game is unfinished?

I too, like @pinkmallows, loved this game at first and was totally obsessed. But now that I've gone to the next island.... Now what? 

I was building up supplies so I'd have them for the next island, but so far I'm not seeing any instructions to progress.

I couldn't wait to get back to the game today, but completed the second island fairly quickly and was hoping to see what else the game offered. 🥴🫤
Same prob ...cant pass second isle..good game till now

First let me say I loved this game, until I finished the first Island and made the raft to go to another Island. Once you leave you can't return, and the second Island took no time to complete and that's it, no more game to play.  Where I had tasks in the first one, the second one I had to build the land out one square at a time.  Now what? It claims to have mountains and all sort of things I have yet to see.  Is this all there is to this game?  I'm so disappointed.

developer_response.body: Thank you for your feedback! New updates will be coming, and we hope to fulfill player requests as soon as possible. Since we are a small team, some updates may take longer than expected.

reviews.review_title: Ik it's a new game but
reviews.review_description:
This game is fun so far as I've tried it tonight but the only one problem I have is I'm having to look down at the ground in order to see what I'm doing is there any way that the developers could fix that by chance or at least have it to where we are at ground level with our character please and thank you that would help a lot because my neck is hurting from looking down. I would change my two star to a five star if that would be a possibility to fix better viewing.  


Any chance you guys have a way I can contact you directly for more details about the game????

developer_response.body:
In the first update, camera angle options will be added. This is currently our top priority. After the update, could you improve the 2-star reviews? The number of people purchasing our game is low, so this is critical for us.
info@esti.tr
